Allelic frequency & mean ex situ & insitu FT

Justine Floret

2026-02-20

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(gtable)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(knitr)
library(stringr) #remove space in string
# Stat. libray
library(lmerTest) #glht
library(lsmeans) #pairwise comparison
library(emmeans)
library(glmmTMB) # negative binomial model
library(vegan) #RDA
library(missMDA) #Missing data imputation, pca
library(ggpubr) #correlation line in plot

I. Preparing the data

Allelic frequency data

Median_AF_50kb_noContamination <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/Genomic/assays/F5_pools_medianAF_50kb_noContamination.csv")

Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Chrm <- as.factor(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Chrm)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Pos_mean <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Pos_mean)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Sample_ID <- as.factor(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Sample_ID)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$median_AF <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$median_AF)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$SNP_tot <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$SNP_tot)

summary(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination)
##    Chrm          Pos_mean          Sample_ID        median_AF     
##  Chr1:38488   Min.   :   25000   1      :  2205   Min.   :0.0000  
##  Chr2:24547   1st Qu.: 6125000   7      :  2205   1st Qu.:0.3585  
##  Chr3:28967   Median :11775000   8      :  2205   Median :0.5172  
##  Chr4:23256   Mean   :12472242   24     :  2205   Mean   :0.5253  
##  Chr5:34680   3rd Qu.:18225000   27     :  2205   3rd Qu.:0.6840  
##               Max.   :30413835   34     :  2205   Max.   :1.0000  
##                                  (Other):136708                   
##     SNP_tot      
##  Min.   :  1.00  
##  1st Qu.: 29.00  
##  Median : 54.00  
##  Mean   : 72.15  
##  3rd Qu.: 99.00  
##  Max.   :499.00  
##

Ex situ flowering time

data_FT_F6 <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/3_Exsitu_phenotype/Flowering_time/assay/F6_tplant_FT_2025.csv")
data_FT_F6 <- data_FT_F6 %>% select(ID_F5_parent, Pop, Individual, Tray, Column, Row, FT, Comments, brought_to_greenhouse )
data_FT_F6$ID_F5_parent <- as.factor(data_FT_F6$ID_F5_parent)
data_FT_F6 <- data_FT_F6 %>% dplyr::mutate(Comments= replace_na(Comments, "Alive"))
data_FT_F6$Comments <- as.factor(data_FT_F6$Comments)
data_FT_F6$Tray <- as.factor(data_FT_F6$Tray)
data_FT_F6 <- data_FT_F6 %>% filter(Comments == "Alive")

Ensure date columns are Date type

data_FT_F6$brought_to_greenhouse <- as.Date(data_FT_F6$brought_to_greenhouse, format = "%Y/%m/%d")
data_FT_F6$FT <- as.Date(data_FT_F6$FT , format = "%m/%d/%y")

Create FT column: number of days between the sowing and the flowering day, if the plant did not flower during the experiment a late flowering time is put (120 days)

data_FT_F6$FT_day <- as.integer(data_FT_F6$FT - data_FT_F6$brought_to_greenhouse)
data_FT_F6$FT_day <- as.numeric(data_FT_F6$FT_day)

Keep the the mean FT per population

data_FT_F6 <- data_FT_F6 %>% group_by(Pop) %>% mutate("mean_FT" = mean(FT_day)) %>% distinct(Pop, .keep_all=TRUE)
data_FT_F6$Pop <- as.factor(data_FT_F6$Pop)

In situ FT

Env_indexes <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/2_Ecological_parameters/2_assays/Ecological_parameters_Environmental_Indexes.csv")
Env_indexes$Site_ID <- as.factor(Env_indexes$Site_ID)

Merged SNP data, FT ex situ

median_AF_FT <- left_join(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination, data_FT_F6[,c(2,11)], join_by("Sample_ID"== "Pop"))
median_AF_FT <- left_join(median_AF_FT, Env_indexes[,c(1,22)], join_by("Sample_ID"== "Site_ID"))

median_AF_FT <- median_AF_FT %>% filter(SNP_tot>10)
median_AF_FT <- median_AF_FT %>% mutate(Onset_FT_2023 = ifelse(Onset_FT_2023 == "-61", 0, Onset_FT_2023))
summary(median_AF_FT)
##    Chrm          Pos_mean          Sample_ID        median_AF     
##  Chr1:34136   Min.   :   25000   1      :  1971   Min.   :0.0000  
##  Chr2:21351   1st Qu.: 6125000   7      :  1971   1st Qu.:0.3600  
##  Chr3:25567   Median :11775000   8      :  1971   Median :0.5179  
##  Chr4:21556   Mean   :12535459   24     :  1971   Mean   :0.5259  
##  Chr5:31416   3rd Qu.:18425000   27     :  1971   3rd Qu.:0.6833  
##               Max.   :30375000   34     :  1971   Max.   :1.0000  
##                                  (Other):122200                   
##     SNP_tot          mean_FT       Onset_FT_2023   
##  Min.   : 11.00   Min.   : 26.75   Min.   :  0.00  
##  1st Qu.: 37.00   1st Qu.: 55.98   1st Qu.: 71.00  
##  Median : 63.00   Median : 73.20   Median : 78.00  
##  Mean   : 80.24   Mean   : 69.75   Mean   : 73.27  
##  3rd Qu.:107.00   3rd Qu.: 80.10   3rd Qu.: 80.00  
##  Max.   :499.00   Max.   :103.88   Max.   :119.00  
##                                    NA's   :9855

Population with no FT measured in situ in 2023 because the sites were not accessible.

median_AF_FT %>%distinct(Sample_ID, Onset_FT_2023) %>% count(is.na(Onset_FT_2023))
median_AF_FT %>%distinct(Sample_ID, Onset_FT_2023) %>% filter(is.na(Onset_FT_2023))

II. Comparison QTL chr2 and chr4

Keeping the positions with the strongest effect on the Spearman correlation (associaion AF ~ meanFT)

data_model <- median_AF_FT %>% filter(Chrm == "Chr2" & Pos_mean ==14725000)
colnames(data_model)[4] <- "median_AF_chr2"
tpm <- median_AF_FT %>% filter(Chrm == "Chr4" & Pos_mean == 275000 )
colnames(tpm)[4] <- "median_AF_chr4"
data_model <- left_join(data_model[,c(3,4,6,7)], tpm[,c(3,4,6,7)])

Ex situ glm

mod_exsitu <- glmmTMB(mean_FT ~ median_AF_chr2 + median_AF_chr4,
                              data = data_model,family = nbinom2)
summary(mod_exsitu)
##  Family: nbinom2  ( log )
## Formula:          mean_FT ~ median_AF_chr2 + median_AF_chr4
## Data: data_model
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##     535.7     544.6    -263.9     527.7        64 
## 
## 
## Dispersion parameter for nbinom2 family (): 79.4 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)     4.63471    0.05218   88.83   <2e-16 ***
## median_AF_chr2 -0.04784    0.08307   -0.58    0.565    
## median_AF_chr4 -0.76780    0.09076   -8.46   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod_exsitu, type="II")
qqnorm(resid(mod_exsitu))

In situ glm

mod_insitu <- glmmTMB(Onset_FT_2023 ~ median_AF_chr2 + median_AF_chr4,
                      data = data_model,family = nbinom2)
summary(mod_insitu)
##  Family: nbinom2  ( log )
## Formula:          Onset_FT_2023 ~ median_AF_chr2 + median_AF_chr4
## Data: data_model
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##     634.6     643.2    -313.3     626.6        59 
## 
## 
## Dispersion parameter for nbinom2 family (): 4.92 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)     4.45311    0.15977  27.872   <2e-16 ***
## median_AF_chr2  0.05554    0.26378   0.211    0.833    
## median_AF_chr4 -0.38839    0.27925  -1.391    0.164    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod_insitu, type="II")
qqnorm(resid(mod_insitu))

III. Correlation

ex situ & in situ FT

data_FT <- median_AF_FT %>% distinct(Sample_ID, mean_FT, Onset_FT_2023)
data_FT <- data_FT %>% filter(!is.na(Onset_FT_2023))

cor.test(data_FT$mean_FT, data_FT$Onset_FT_2023,  method = "spearman")
## 
##  Spearman's rank correlation rho
## 
## data:  data_FT$mean_FT and data_FT$Onset_FT_2023
## S = 37313, p-value = 0.4154
## alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
## sample estimates:
##       rho 
## 0.1044243
ggplot(data_FT, aes(x=mean_FT, y=Onset_FT_2023)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method=lm , color="red", se=TRUE) +
  theme_minimal()

chr4 & chr2

data_chr <- data_model %>% distinct(Sample_ID, median_AF_chr2, median_AF_chr4)

cor.test(data_chr$median_AF_chr2, data_chr$median_AF_chr4,  method = "spearman")
## 
##  Spearman's rank correlation rho
## 
## data:  data_chr$median_AF_chr2 and data_chr$median_AF_chr4
## S = 39001, p-value = 0.03539
## alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
## sample estimates:
##       rho 
## 0.2556173
ggplot(data_chr, aes(x=median_AF_chr2, y=median_AF_chr4)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method=lm , color="red", se=TRUE) +
  theme_minimal()
